title: Cuneiform Tablet #0036: Old Babylonian Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
